name: Baked Eggplant Slices
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb Eggplant, unpeeled, cut into About 12 slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange eggplant slices on a baking sheet coated with vegetable-oil spray.
2. Place about one tablespoonful of spaghetti sauce on each slice.
3. With the back of a spoon, spread sauce almost to the edge of each slice. (Optional: Sprinkle with your favorite herbs and spices).
4. Bake at 350°F for about 30-35 minutes. Eggplant slices are done when they are tender and can be pierced easily with a fork.
5. Use them as a sandwich filling, or serve them as a side dish or over rice or pasta as an entree.
